settings.urls_help: Once enabled, the following URLs will serve LLM-friendly content about your forum.
settings.enabled_help: Serve a concise index of your forum at {url} — links to categories and recent discussions.
settings.full_enabled_help: Serve the full text of all discussions at {url} — includes every post's content.
settings.sort_help: How discussions are sorted in both generated files.
settings.max_discussions_help: Maximum number of discussions to list (1–1000). Default: 100.
settings.max_posts_help: Maximum number of posts to include per discussion in the full file (1–500). Default: 50.
settings.custom_intro_placeholder: Enter an optional introduction that will appear below the forum title in both files.
settings.custom_intro_help: Leave blank to omit. Plain text or Markdown supported.
